parsed_review.summary: Independent read-only review of CP00-400 (payments core P03-closeout / P04-foundation descriptor pack, RP13, risk_class C, 150 units, range RP13.P03.M06.S15-RP13.P04.M05.S15) via Read/Grep/Glob only. VERDICT: PASS, no findings at any severity. The pack-level production_ready claim is correctly and honestly FALSE everywhere (command-evidence.json production_ready:false; registry/manifest production_ready_flag is a descriptor-verification token "payments_core_p03_closeout_p04_foundation_descriptor_verified", not a runtime/production assertion; the Hermes packet's production_ready_candidate:true means only that coverage+descriptor validations passed, gated behind H13 control-plane evidence and downstream human approval). All boundaries verified intact against freshly-read source: (1) No real data — freezeCp400Result sets synthetic_only/no_real_data true, loads_real_fixture_data false; (2) No writes — writes_product_state false plus ~20 specific dispatch/create/update/persist/append/audit flags all false; (3) Descriptor-only — every section row carries descriptor_only:true, runtime_execution:false, raw_payload_included:false, no payments/payment-matching/AR-aging/journal-entry runtime opened; (4) Claude NOT final approver — authority_boundary.claude_is_final_approval false, no_write_attestation.promotes_claude_to_final_approval false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening true; (5) Enterprise trust NOT claimed from local validation — claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust false; (6) Hermes confined to deterministic control-plane review packet/receipt — emits_hermes_runtime_receipt false, hermes_packet is descriptor-only strings under gate H13, no product-runtime embedding. Distribution integrity confirmed: phase_counts (57+93), micro_phase_row_counts, and deliverable_counts (claude_review 12, implementation 49, contract 13, security_audit 14, test 9, hermes_evidence 5, ui 45, fixture 3) each sum to 150 and match the baseline. Enforcement layer is non-vacuous: validatePaymentsCoreCp400Coverage recomputes the summary from the live plan pack (not from the requirements constant) and checks pack_id/risk/unit_count/first/last/dedup/RP13-only plus all four distribution maps and per-section row titles; validatePaymentsCoreCp400P03CloseoutP04FoundationDescriptor asserts per-row descriptor flags, the no-write attestation, both authority boundaries, the contract projection, and the CP00-401/RP13.P04.M05.S16 handoff; model.test.js asserts coverage.valid, the eleven micro-phase counts, every row descriptor_only/runtime_execution, claude_is_final_approval false, and the no-write attestation flags; node --check/--test, rp05-rp13 validates, closeout-pack-plan/weighted/spec/rp00/goal/fullplan validates, npm test, npm run validate, npm run build, and git diff --check all exit 0; the contract (current_pack.pack_id CP00-400) and validate-rp13 script agree. CP178+ review hardening satisfied: auth preflight passed (exit 0, 1445-byte stdout, valid success JSON — no auth failure, no 0-byte stdout, no malformed/fenced/tool-shaped output); forbidden_review_evidence blockers are wired into the Claude review packet; tools restricted to Read/Grep/Glob (forbidden_tools_present false); summary_only_review_allowed false, so source was inspected via read tools. The absence of raw-output.json / review-receipt.json / claude-review-result.json / adjudication / construction-inspection is expected and correct — this review IS the pending step (pack_level_claude_review.status "pending", valid_review_receipts []). This PASS supports pack-level closeout readiness only; it does NOT itself constitute final approval or an enterprise-trust claim — the documented human final-approval step and the post-review gated commands remain required before commit, consistent with the authority boundary.
